summary: Read-only systems review accepts the M7 situation map UX recovery. The implementation keeps changes in read-model/presentation layers, uses deterministic synthetic soft-region presentation without new authoritative geography, de-noises routes only in situation mode while preserving complete routes mode, routes new player-visible text through i18n, and keeps player mode free of visible rectangular-grid/debug diagnostics.

tests_run.result: PASS; reviewed 19 changed files, all within allowed task/process paths.

decisions: ACCEPT: packages/client-core soft regions are deterministic presentation-only derivations from synthetic M2 fixture IDs and fixed constants.
ACCEPT: packages/map-renderer filters routes only when mode is situation; non-situation modes return the full route set.
ACCEPT: React passes read model and viewport intent to map-renderer; Pixi remains renderer-owned and rebuildable.
ACCEPT: New player-facing situation/legend/recommendation labels are covered by en-US and zh-CN i18n entries.
ACCEPT: No forbidden paths or dependency/package changes were touched.
risks: This remains low-fidelity synthetic map presentation, not final cartography or historical geography.
Systems reviewer did not rerun pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e, or pnpm check in the read-only review; writer/lead evidence records PASS and lead will rerun integration gates before PR merge.
requested_action: Lead may run integration gates, create PR, merge after CI, synchronize main, and close M7-MAP-SITUATION-MODE-UX-001.
